questions.q: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy warned that a recent U.S. decision extending sanctions exemptions on Russian oil shipments could bring how much money to Russia's war effort?
The Dutch cabinet recently activated the first phase of its national oil crisis plan due to commercial vessels being attacked and instability in which major maritime chokepoint?
Which three countries recently pledged to boost humanitarian aid to Cuba, calling for an end to ongoing U.S. economic blockades and military threats?
Marking a historic first in modern warfare, Ukraine successfully shot down a Russian Shahed attack drone using an interceptor launched from what kind of platform?
Due to a continued rise in infection rates, Russia's Health Minister recently urged that what proportion of the country's population be tested for HIV annually?
